questions.answer: How do I compare thee to a summer's day?

final.clue: According to Suetonius it was inscribed on a parade wagon after the 5-day Pontic campaign of 47 B.C.
final.answer: "Veni, Vidi, Vici" ("I came, I saw, I conquered")
